name: figy-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike spicy flavor.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/2 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to restore 1/8 its max HP.  If the holder dislikes spicy flavors (i.e., has a nature that lowers Attack), it will also become confused.
flavor_text: A hold item that restores HP but may cause confusion when used.

name: wiki-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike dry flavor.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/2 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to restore 1/8 its max HP.  If the holder dislikes dry flavors (i.e., has a nature that lowers Special Attack), it will also become confused.
flavor_text: A hold item that restores HP but may cause confusion when used.

name: mago-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sweet flavor.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/2 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to restore 1/8 its max HP.  If the holder dislikes sweet flavors (i.e., has a nature that lowers Speed), it will also become confused.
flavor_text: A hold item that restores HP but may cause confusion when used.

name: aguav-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike bitter flavor.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/2 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to restore 1/8 its max HP.  If the holder dislikes bitter flavors (i.e., has a nature that lowers Special Defense), it will also become confused.
flavor_text: A hold item that restores HP but may cause confusion when used.

name: iapapa-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/2 max HP to restore 1/8 max HP. Confuses Pokémon that dislike sour flavor.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/2 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to restore 1/8 its max HP.  If the holder dislikes sour flavors (i.e., has a nature that lowers Defense), it will also become confused.
flavor_text: A hold item that restores HP but may cause confusion when used.

name: pomeg-berry
effect: Drops HP Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers HP effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: kelpsy-berry
effect: Drops Attack Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers Attack effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: qualot-berry
effect: Drops Defense Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers Defense effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: hondew-berry
effect: Drops Special Attack Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers Special Attack effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: grepa-berry
effect: Drops Special Defense Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers Special Defense effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: tamato-berry
effect: Drops Speed Effort Values by 10 and raises happiness.
effect_long:
Used on a party Pokémon
:   Increases happiness by 10/5/2.  Lowers Speed effort by 10.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: liechi-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Attack.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the ATTACK stat in a pinch.

name: ganlon-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Defense.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the DEFENSE stat in a pinch.

name: salac-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Speed.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its Speed by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the SPEED stat in a pinch.

name: petaya-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Special Attack.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its Special Attack by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the SP. ATK stat in a pinch.

name: apicot-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost Special Defense.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its Special Defense by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the SP. DEF stat in a pinch.

name: lansat-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost critical hit ratio by two stages.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise its critical hit chance by one stage.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it raises the critical-hit ratio in a pinch.

name: starf-berry
effect: Held: Consumed at 1/4 max HP to boost a random stat by two stages.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder has 1/4 its max HP remaining or less, it consumes this item to raise a random stat by two stages.
flavor_text: When held by a POKéMON, it sharply raises one stat in a pinch.

name: enigma-berry
effect: Held: Consumed when struck by a super-effective attack to restore 1/4 max HP.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder takes super-effective damage, it consumes this item to restore 1/4 its max HP.
flavor_text: Can be ground up into a powder as an ingredient for medicine.

name: bright-powder
effect: Held: Increases the holder’s evasion by 1/9 (11 1/9%).
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   Moves targeting the holder have 0.9× chance to hit.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It casts a tricky glare that lowers the opponent’s accuracy.

name: white-herb
effect: Held: Resets all lowered stats to normal at end of turn. Consumed after use.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   At the end of each turn, if any of the holder’s stats have a negative stat modifier, the holder consumes this item to remove the modifiers from those stats.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It restores any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.

name: macho-brace
effect: Held: Holder gains double effort values from battles, but has halved Speed in battle.
effect_long:
Held
:   When the holder would gain effort due to battle, it gains double that effort instead.

Held in battle
:   Holder has half its Speed.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It promotes strong growth but lowers SPEED while it is held.

name: quick-claw
effect: Held: Holder has a 3/16 (18.75%) chance to move first.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   Whenever the holder attempts to use a move, it has a 3/16 chance to act first among moves with the same priority.  If multiple Pokémon have this effect at the same time, Speed is the tie-breaker as normal, but the effect of trick room is ignored.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A light and sharp claw. The holder may be able to strike first.

name: mental-herb
effect: Held: Consumed to cure infatuation. Gen V: Also removes Taunt, Encore, Torment, Disable, and Cursed Body.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   When the holder is attracted, it consumes this item to cure the attraction.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It snaps the holder out of infatuation. It can be used once.

name: choice-band
effect: Held: Increases Attack by 50%, but restricts the holder to only one move.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   Holder has 1.5× its Attack.  When the holder attempts to use a move, all its other moves are disabled until it leaves battle or loses this item.

    The restriction ends even if this item is swapped for another Choice item
via trick or switcheroo.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It powers up one move, which becomes the only usable one.

name: kings-rock
effect: Held: Damaging moves gain a 10% chance to make their target flinch. Traded on a Poliwhirl: Holder evolves into Politoed. Traded on a Slowpoke: Holder evolves into Slowking.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   Holder’s damaging moves have a 10% chance to make their target flinch.  This chance applies independently to each hit of a multi-hit move.

    This item’s chance is rolled independently of any other move effects;
e.g., a move with a 30% chance to flinch normally will have a 37% total chance to flinch when used with this item, because 3% of the time, both effects activate.

Held by poliwhirl or slowbro
:   Holder evolves into politoed or slowking, respectively, when traded.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It may cause the foe to flinch upon taking damage.

name: silver-powder
effect: Held: Bug-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long:
Held in battle
:   Holder’s bug-type moves have 1.1× their power.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A shiny silver powder that boosts the power of BUG-type moves.

name: soul-dew
effect: Raises Latias and Latios’s Special Attack and Special Defense by 50%.
effect_long: Held by Latias or Latios: Increases the holder’s Special Attack and Special Defense by 50%.
flavor_text: An orb to be held by a LATIOS or LATIAS. It raises the SP. ATK and SP. DEF stats.

name: deep-sea-tooth
effect: Doubles Clamperl’s Special Attack. Traded on a Clamperl: Holder evolves into Huntail.
effect_long: Held by Clamperl: Doubles the holder’s Special Attack.  Evolves the holder into Huntail when traded.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A fang that gleams a sharp silver. It raises the SP. ATK stat.

name: deep-sea-scale
effect: Doubles Clamperl’s Special Defense. Traded on a Clamperl: Holder evolves into Gorebyss.
effect_long: Held by Clamperl: Doubles the holder’s Special Defense.  Evolves the holder into Gorebyss when traded.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A scale that shines a faint pink. It raises the SP. DEF stat.

name: smoke-ball
effect: Held: Allows the Holder to escape from any wild battle.
effect_long: Held: In wild battles, attempts to run away on the holder’s turn will always succeed.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. The holding POKéMON can flee from any wild POKéMON for sure.

name: focus-band
effect: Held: Holder has 10% chance to survive attacks or self-inflicted damage at 1 HP.
effect_long: Held: If the holder is attacked for regular damage that would faint it, this item has a 10% chance to prevent the holder’s HP from lowering below 1.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. The holding POKéMON may endure an attack, leaving just 1 HP.

name: scope-lens
effect: Held: Raises the holder’s critical hit ratio by one stage.
effect_long: Held: Raises the holder’s critical hit counter by 1.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A lens that boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holding POKéMON.

name: metal-coat
effect: Held: Steel-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long:
Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Steel moves by 10%.
Held by Onix or Scyther: Evolves the holder into Steelix or Scizor when traded, respectively.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A special metallic film that boosts the power of STEEL-type moves.

name: leftovers
effect: Held: Restores 1/16 (6.25%) holder’s max HP at the end of each turn.
effect_long: Held: Heals the holder by 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. The holding POKéMON gradually regains HP during battle.

name: light-ball
effect: Doubles Pikachu’s Attack and Special Attack. Breed on Pikachu or Raichu: Pichu Egg will have Volt Tackle.
effect_long: Held by Pikachu: Doubles the holder’s initial Attack and Special Attack.
flavor_text: An orb to be held by a PIKACHU that raises the SP. ATK stat. Touching it may cause a shock.

name: soft-sand
effect: Held: Ground-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Ground moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A loose, silky sand that boosts the power of GROUND-type moves.

name: hard-stone
effect: Held: Rock-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Rock moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. An unbreakable stone that boosts the power of ROCK-type moves.

name: miracle-seed
effect: Held: Grass-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Grass moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A seed imbued with life that boosts the power of GRASS-type moves.

name: black-glasses
effect: Held: Dark-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Dark moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A shady-looking pair of glasses that boosts DARK-type moves.

name: black-belt
effect: Held: Fighting-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Fighting moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A belt that boosts determination and FIGHTING-type moves.

name: magnet
effect: Held: Electric-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Electric moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A powerful magnet that boosts the power of ELECTRIC-type moves.

name: mystic-water
effect: Held: Water-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Water moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A teardrop-shaped gem that boosts the power of WATER-type moves.

name: sharp-beak
effect: Held: Flying-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Flying moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A long, sharp beak that boosts the power of FLYING-type moves.

name: poison-barb
effect: Held: Poison-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Poison moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A small, poisonous barb that boosts the power of POISON-type moves.

name: never-melt-ice
effect: Held: Ice-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Ice moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A piece of ice that repels heat and boosts ICE-type moves.

name: spell-tag
effect: Held: Ghost-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Ghost moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A sinister, eerie tag that boosts GHOST-type moves.

name: twisted-spoon
effect: Held: Psychic-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Psychic moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A spoon imbued with telekinetic power boosts PSYCHIC-type moves.

name: charcoal
effect: Held: Fire-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Fire moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A combustible fuel that boosts the power of FIRE-type moves.

name: dragon-fang
effect: Held: Dragon-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Dragon moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A hard and sharp fang that boosts the power of DRAGON-type moves.

name: silk-scarf
effect: Held: Normal-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Normal moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. A sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of NORMAL-type moves.

name: shell-bell
effect: Held: Holder receives 1/8 of the damage it deals when attacking.
effect_long: Held: Heals the holder by 1/8 of any damage it inflicts.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. The holding POKéMON regains some HP upon striking the foe.

name: sea-incense
effect: Held: Water-Type moves from holder do 10% more damage. Breeding: Marill or Azumarill beget an Azurill Egg.
effect_long: Held: Increases the power of the holder’s Water moves by 10%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It slightly boosts the power of WATER-type moves.

name: lax-incense
effect: Held: Holder’s evasion is increased by 5%. Breeding: Wobbuffet begets a Wynaut Egg.
effect_long: Held: Increases the holder’s Evasion by 5%.
flavor_text: An item to be held by a POKéMON. Its tricky aroma slightly reduces the foe’s accuracy.

name: lucky-punch
effect: Raises Chansey’s critical hit ratio by two stages.
effect_long: Held by Chansey: Raises the holder’s critical hit counter by 2.
flavor_text: A glove to be held by a CHANSEY. It raises CHANSEY’s critical-hit ratio.

name: metal-powder
effect: Raises Ditto’s Defense and Special Defense by 50%. The boost is lost after transforming.
effect_long: Held by Ditto: Increases the holder’s initial Defense and Special Defense by 50%.
flavor_text: A fine, hard powder to be held by a DITTO. It raises DITTO’s DEFENSE stat.

name: thick-club
effect: Doubles Cubone or Marowak’s Attack.
effect_long: Held by Cubone or Marowak: Doubles the holder’s Attack.
flavor_text: A hard bone of some sort to be held by a CUBONE or MAROWAK. It raises the ATTACK stat.

name: stick
effect: Raises Farfetch’d’s critical hit ratio by two stages.
effect_long: Held by Farfetch’d: Raises the holder’s critical hit counter by 2.
flavor_text: A stick of leek to be held by a FARFETCH’D. It raises FARFETCH’D’s critical-hit ratio.
